current_conclusion: The patched JS5 modulus is persisted into a constructed client object at offset +0x68, alongside the shared exponent at +0x60.
This is the first strong semantic owner of the patched key material in the client code we have identified so far.
The earlier helper 0x14015D330 is only a URL formatter; the real JS5 key handoff happens through wrapper 0x14002EC80 into constructor 0x14058EE40.
